name: Eternal Spark Ring
description: A timeless solitaire ring featuring a brilliant lab-grown diamond, set in polished 18K gold. Each stone is carefully selected for its fire and clarity, making this piece a symbol of everlasting love.
details: This exquisite ring showcases a 1.0 carat lab-grown diamond with VS1 clarity and F color grade. The classic four-prong setting allows maximum light to enter the stone, creating breathtaking brilliance. Crafted in 18K gold, the band features a comfort-fit design perfect for everyday wear.

specs.Stone: Lab-Grown Diamond, 1.0ct, VS1 Clarity, F Color

name: Moonlit Halo Ring
description: A stunning halo ring where a radiant moissanite center stone is embraced by a circle of delicate accent stones. The perfect balance of brilliance and sophistication.
details: Featuring a 1.5 carat round brilliant moissanite center stone surrounded by a halo of micro-pavé accent stones. The 18K white gold setting enhances the stone's icy brilliance, while the split shank adds a modern twist to this classic design.

name: Whisper Chain Necklace
description: An elegant pendant necklace featuring a delicate lab-grown diamond suspended on a fine silver chain. Minimalist beauty that speaks volumes.
details: This pendant features a 0.3 carat lab-grown diamond in a bezel setting, hanging from a 45cm fine cable chain in 925 sterling silver with rhodium plating for lasting shine. The adjustable chain length makes it perfect for layering or wearing alone.

name: Golden Embrace Bracelet
description: A graceful chain bracelet adorned with sparkling moissanite accent stones. Delicate yet impactful, designed for the modern woman.
details: This refined bracelet features five station-set moissanite stones along a delicate 18K gold cable chain. The lobster clasp closure with extension chain ensures a perfect fit. Each stone catches the light beautifully, adding subtle sparkle to every gesture.

name: Starlight Drop Earrings
description: Elegant drop earrings featuring brilliant lab-grown diamonds that dance with light. A perfect statement piece for any occasion.
details: Each earring showcases a 0.5 carat lab-grown diamond in a four-prong drop setting, connected to the ear wire by a delicate gold link. The total diamond weight of 1.0 carat delivers stunning brilliance that frames the face beautifully.

name: Rose Petal Ring
description: Inspired by the soft curves of rose petals, this ring features a moissanite centerpiece in warm rose gold. Romantic and distinctive.
details: A 0.8 carat oval moissanite sits in a unique petal-inspired setting crafted in 18K rose gold. The organic design flows gracefully around the stone, creating a one-of-a-kind piece that celebrates nature's beauty.

name: Infinity Love Necklace
description: An infinity-inspired pendant symbolizing endless love, featuring a stunning lab-grown diamond at its heart. A meaningful gift for someone special.
details: The infinity symbol pendant is crafted in 18K gold and set with a 0.5 carat lab-grown diamond at the crossing point. Suspended from a 50cm adjustable chain, this piece carries deep symbolism and exceptional craftsmanship.

specs.Stone: Lab-Grown Diamond, 0.5ct, VS1 Clarity, E Color

name: Celestial Huggie Earrings
description: Chic huggie hoop earrings with sparkling moissanite accents. Perfect for everyday elegance.
details: These huggie hoops feature channel-set moissanite stones around the outer edge, crafted in 925 sterling silver with rhodium plating. The hinged closure makes them easy to put on and comfortable to wear all day.
